description: Composition Grey melange round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton that has ribbed round neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves and distressed look graphic print on the front Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use a mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly and line dry inside out in shade Wram iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Update your casual style with this grey melange T-shirt from probase. The slightly distressed look graphic print of the antique tv set with the words "All your friends are zombies" on the screen lends this tee a funky vibe. Team this with jeans and sneakers for a cool look, while the fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
